---
subtitle: "A Practical Guide to Cloud Financial Management"
---

# The FinOps Playbook {.unnumbered}

## Preface {.unnumbered}

Cloud computing has transformed how organizations build and deliver software. But with the flexibility and power of the cloud comes a new challenge: managing costs at scale.

This book is a practical guide for engineering leaders, DevOps teams, and finance professionals who want to take control of their cloud spending without sacrificing velocity or innovation.

## Who This Book Is For {.unnumbered}

- **Engineering leaders** who want to build cost-aware teams
- **DevOps/Platform engineers** responsible for cloud infrastructure
- **Finance teams** who need to understand and forecast cloud costs
- **FinOps practitioners** looking for actionable strategies

## How to Read This Book {.unnumbered}

Each chapter is designed to be self-contained. You can read cover-to-cover or jump to the topics most relevant to your role:

| Chapters | Best For |
|----------|----------|
| 1–2 | Everyone — foundational concepts |
| 3–4 | FinOps practitioners and finance teams |
| 5–6 | Engineers and platform teams |
| 7 | Leadership and change management |
| 8 | Anyone looking for real-world examples |

## Conventions Used {.unnumbered}

Throughout this book, you'll find:

::: {.callout-tip}
**Tips** highlight best practices and quick wins.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
**Notes** provide additional context or caveats.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
**Warnings** flag common mistakes to avoid.
:::
